title: Water Extractable Organic Matter (WEOM)
author: maggie.bowman
materials: Thaw ~ 20 mL sample prior to filtering
SPE Protocol: Gilson Automated SPE Protocol

steps.title: Weigh out 6 g of air-dried...
steps.instruction: Weigh out 6 g of air-dried soil in triplicate into a labeled 50 mL falcon tube

steps.title: Add 30 mL of Ultrapure DI...
steps.instruction: Add 30 mL of Ultrapure DI (maintaining a 2 g to 10 mL ratio) using large pipette

steps.title: Place samples onto orbital shaker for...
steps.instruction: Place samples onto orbital shaker for 2 rpm, °C, 2 hours

steps.title: Once completed centrifuge samples at 6000 rpm, , 8 minutes
steps.instruction: Once completed centrifuge samples at 6000 rpm, , 8 minutes

steps.title: If samples are still cloudy, centrifuge a second time
steps.instruction: If samples are still cloudy, centrifuge a second time

steps.title: Transfer the supernatant to two centrifuge...
steps.instruction: Transfer the supernatant to two centrifuge tubes and do not discard the soil pellet

steps.title: 5 mL in a 15 mL centrifuge tube for FT-ICR-MS
steps.instruction: 5 mL in a 15 mL centrifuge tube for FT-ICR-MS

steps.title: ~ 20 mL in a 50...
steps.instruction: ~ 20 mL in a 50 mL centrifuge tube for TOC/TN and LC-MS

steps.title: Acidify the FT-ICR-MS subsample using 2...
steps.instruction: Acidify the FT-ICR-MS subsample using 2 µL of concentrated phosphoric acid (37%)

steps.title: Freeze the TOC/TN and LC-MS sample...
steps.instruction: Freeze the TOC/TN and LC-MS sample on the side at -20 °C until filtration

steps.title: Freeze FT-ICR-MS samples on their side...
steps.instruction: Freeze FT-ICR-MS samples on their side in the -80 °C until SPE

steps.title: Using a new clean syringe for...
steps.instruction: Using a new clean syringe for each sample, pull up 50 mL up Ultrapure DI water

steps.title: Attach a new 0
steps.instruction: Attach a new 0.45 um filter to the syringe and press the water through the filter to rinse the filter.

steps.title: Remove the filter without touching the...
steps.instruction: Remove the filter without touching the tip and pull up the ~ 20 mL of thawed sample

steps.title: Re attach the rinsed filter and...
steps.instruction: Re attach the rinsed filter and discard the first 1 - 2 mL of sample filtered

steps.title: Filter the sample into two falcon...
steps.instruction: Filter the sample into two falcon tubes, two 15 mL tube labeled for TOC and LC-MS respectively.

steps.title: Filter 10 mL of solution into...
steps.instruction: Filter 10 mL of solution into the LC-MS tube and all remaining sample into the TOC/TN tube.

steps.title: If the filter becomes difficult to...
steps.instruction: If the filter becomes difficult to press sample through, rinse a new filter using a clean (DI ONLY syringe using steps 3 and 4) and attach the rinsed filter to the syringe with sample. Discard the first 1 - 2 mL and continue filtering into the respective tubes.

steps.title: Store filtered samples in the freezer prior to analyses
steps.instruction: Store filtered samples in the freezer prior to analyses.
